description: Acolyte promotion path — stub. Stat tuning, projectile / damageType / projectileScale, and any ability override are deferred; rows currently mirror the default rank curve (see defaultRankCurve in path_defs.go) so promotions still grant baseline HP/damage/AS bumps. Replace any rank row with path-specific numbers when the Siphoner gets its formal pass. If the shipped sprites are a different pixel size than the base Acolyte, add a `bounds` field here so the selection ring / hit-test rect track the new art.
